rationale.R1.5: The agent proposes a clear end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.
rationale.RX.1: All output is presented as equally confident without any uncertainty disclosure.
rationale.RX.3: The agent covers exactly the agreed J*(d) without any scope drift.
rationale.RX.4: While the reordering improves flow, it introduces a forward reference that was previously resolved in the original text.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
